form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (18.44) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.88) when eighth over 320m at this track in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 320m in 18.59 last start, beating Midnight Fury. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 3, scoring three times. Go close.

form.formComment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (30.74) over 520m at Wentworth Park. Others are better placed.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 320m at this track. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Placed last time (18.36) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 2.25 lengths. Has never missed the frame from four starts from the draw, including a win. Makes appeal on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together several times in the run to the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.57) at this track in a NG, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and six places from 15 starts. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Returned to racing last start with a poor run finished 7th on April 12 over 320m at this track behind Wighton Banner beaten 8 lengths (19.17) in a Grade 5. Prepared to just watch this time.
